capabilities.name: Portmason Capability Catalog
capabilities.summary: Lists and searches reusable Portmason capabilities before project-local behavior is authored.

capabilities.name: Portmason Pattern Registry
capabilities.summary: Lists, searches, and validates canonical and candidate Portmason patterns.

capabilities.name: PM Configuration Manager
capabilities.summary: Registers, validates, scopes, derives, and delivers variables, secrets, and control-plane credentials.

capabilities.name: PM Linting Suite
capabilities.summary: Mechanically enforces known TGF/EPC patterns and flags emerging patterns for deliberate review.

capabilities.name: Project Migration Preservation Manifest
capabilities.summary: Creates, validates, and summarizes migration preservation manifests.

capabilities.name: Portmason Setup Orchestrator
capabilities.summary: Coordinates configuration generation, preflight, provisioning, configuration delivery, setup, and deployment without absorbing entity-owned behavior.

capabilities.name: Portmason Viewport Navigation
capabilities.summary: Canonical hash and viewport alignment behavior for Portmason-based public sites.
outputs: consistent direct and clicked navigation alignment

capabilities.name: Selective Build Extraction
capabilities.summary: Applies only the files listed in an embedded project/chg.txt from a verified build archive.

capabilities.name: ReviewNudge Launch Conductor
capabilities.summary: Runs the repeatable dependency-ordered Traefik, Coming Soon, and ReviewNudge launch workflow.
